children.heading: Educational benefits and awards
children.label: a Educational benefits and awards
children.text: If a participant in the Public Lands Corps or a resource assistant also serves in an approved national service position designated under subtitle C of title I of the National and Community Service Act of 1990 [ et seq.], the participant or resource assistant shall be eligible for a national service educational award in the manner prescribed in subtitle D of such title [ et seq.] upon successfully complying with the requirements for the award. The period during which the national service educational award may be used, the purposes for which the award may be used, and the amount of the award shall be determined as provided under such subtitle.42 U.S.C. 1257142 U.S.C. 12601

children.heading: Forbearance in collection of Stafford loans
children.label: b Forbearance in collection of Stafford loans
children.text: For purposes of , in the case of borrowers who are either participants in the Corps or resource assistants, upon written request, a lender shall grant a borrower forbearance on such terms as are otherwise consistent with the regulations of the Secretary of Education, during periods in which the borrower is serving as such a participant or a resource assistant.section 1078 of title 20
